app.title: Engaging Reader
upload.label: Mag-upload ng file
upload.ariaLabel: Mag-upload ng dokumento: i-click para mag-browse ng mga file o i-drag at i-drop. Sinusuportahan: Mga larawan at PDF file hanggang 50MB
disclaimer.bold: Ang Engaging Reader ay hindi idinisenyo upang humawak ng sensitibong personal na datos.
disclaimer.regular: Mangyaring huwag mag-upload ng mga dokumento na naglalaman ng impormasyong pinansyal, numero ng ID ng pamahalaan, mga detalye medikal, o iba pang kumpidensyal na nilalaman.
status.extracted: Matagumpay na na-extract ang teksto. Pindutin ang spacebar para magsimulang magbasa o ang tab para lumipat sa mga salita.
errors.selectFile: Paki piliin muna ang isang file.
errors.selectFileVisible: Paki piliin muna ang isang file ng larawan.
errors.invalidType: Hindi wastong uri ng file. Piliin ang isang larawan o PDF na file.
errors.invalidTypeVisible: Piliin ang isang wastong file (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, WebP, o PDF).
errors.fileTooLarge: Masyadong malaki ang file. Piliin mangyaring isang file na mas mababa sa 50MB.
errors.fileTooLargeVisible: Ang laki ng file ay lumalagpas sa limitasyong 50MB. Piliin mangyaring isang mas maliit na file.
errors.processFailed: Hindi naiproseso ang file. Mangyaring subukan muli.
definition.title: Kahulugan
definition.loadFailed: Hindi na-load ang depinisyon. Mangyaring subukan muli.

__source__.app.title: Engaging Reader
__source__.upload.label: Upload File
__source__.upload.ariaLabel: Upload document: click to browse files or drag and drop. Supported: Images and PDF files up to 50MB
__source__.disclaimer.bold: Engaging Reader is not intended to handle sensitive personal data.
__source__.disclaimer.regular: Please do not upload documents with financial information, government ID numbers, medical details, or other confidential content.
__source__.status.extracted: Text extracted successfully. Use spacebar to start reading or tab to navigate words.
__source__.errors.selectFileVisible: Please select an image file first.
__source__.errors.invalidType: Invalid file type. Please select an image or PDF file.
__source__.errors.invalidTypeVisible: Please select a valid file (JPEG, PNG, HEIC, WebP, or PDF).
__source__.errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Please choose a file under 50MB.
__source__.errors.fileTooLargeVisible: File size exceeds 50MB limit. Please choose a smaller file.
__source__.errors.processFailed: Failed to process file. Please try again.
__source__.definition.title: Definition
__source__.definition.loadFailed: Could not load definition. Please try again.
